message:
test(pt-core): add 31 no-mock tests for evidence collection (aii.7.3)

Add comprehensive no-mock tests that exercise evidence collection
functions against real /proc filesystem and system commands:

- proc_parsers: 9 tests for parse_io, parse_statm, parse_schedstat,
  parse_sched, parse_fd, parse_cgroup, parse_wchan, parse_environ,
  and proc_snapshot integration
- deep_scan: 4 tests for deep_scan, scan_process with environ,
  list_all_pids, and identity quality extraction
- quick_scan: 4 tests for all processes scan, specific PID lookup,
  metadata validation, and process field verification
- cgroup: 4 tests for cgroup details collection, spawned process
  detection, systemd slice detection, and effective_cores calculation
- container: 4 tests for marker detection, real cgroup detection,
  K8s env detection, and spawned process container detection
- systemd: 6 tests for is_systemd_available, is_systemd_managed,
  collect_systemd_unit for self and spawned processes, fallback
  path testing, and active state running detection

All tests use ProcessHarness to spawn real processes and emit
JSONL logs via test_log!() macro for CI observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
